title: Error accessing n8n WebUI after update
symptom: After updating to the latest version of n8n, users encounter 'window.crypto.randomUUID is not a function' error, preventing access to the WebUI.
not_this_if: Using an earlier version of n8n
root_cause: The error occurs because the function 'window.crypto.randomUUID' is not supported in the browser environment being used, likely due to compatibility issues introduced in the latest n8n version.
agent_instruction: Downgrade n8n to version 1.119.2 to resolve the WebUI access issue.
